deployments.commit_message:
feat: staging integration - admin panel connects to landing pages

- Add media-staging.php with by-tag, all, by-tag-ordered, update-order, reorder endpoints
- Update UnifiedAdminApp.jsx to use media-staging.php and normalize tag data
- Update all landing page galleries to auto-detect staging hosts and use media-staging.php
- Landing pages now reflect admin changes in real-time on staging environment
- Admin upload → Database → Landing page display flow fully integrated

fix: staging integration - correct admin panel and database

- Replace unified-admin/index.html with staging integration
- Add local staging database configuration (SQLite)
- Fix staging API to use local database for testing
- Admin panel now uses media-staging.php correctly
- Landing pages will now reflect admin changes in staging
